privacyPolicy.inAppLocation: Settings > AirVision M1 > App Preferences > Privacy Policy

appAccess.reviewAccessInstructions: OpenClaw HUD can be reviewed without a live gateway by opening Settings > AirVision M1 > App Preferences and enabling Demo Mode. Gateway pairing is optional for the HUD surface. If Google Play review needs live gateway features, provide a temporary setup code or demo gateway credentials in the Play Console App access form only; do not store those credentials in this repository.

targetAudience.rationale: OpenClaw HUD is a developer/operator assistant HUD for Samsung DeX and wearable display workflows, not a children-directed app.

contentRating.notes: No gambling, financial trading, dating, UGC social feed, or ads. Assistant responses depend on the user-configured OpenClaw gateway and selected model/provider.

dataDeletion.userDeletionPath: Android Settings > Apps > OpenClaw HUD > Storage > Clear data, or uninstall the app.
dataDeletion.notes: The HUD app does not create an OpenClaw cloud account. Gateway accounts, logs, and model-provider data are controlled by the user's configured gateway/provider.

dataSafety.dataEncryptedInTransitNotes: Public gateway URLs require wss:// or Tailscale Serve. The app also permits cleartext ws:// only for localhost, Android emulator, private LAN, link-local, and Tailnet-style addresses so developers can connect to self-hosted gateways. Do not answer that all collected user data is encrypted in transit unless these self-hosted cleartext paths are disabled before submission.

collectedData.whereUsed: Wake word, push-to-talk, and realtime caption/translation workflows when enabled by the user.
collectedData.destination: Configured OpenClaw gateway and the model/provider selected through that gateway.

collectedData.whereUsed: HUD chat messages, assistant run status, active session/provider selections, and notification summaries when enabled.
Local gateway connection state, device capability status, AirVision profile settings, and diagnostics exports created explicitly by the user.
collectedData.destination: Stored locally unless the user exports diagnostics or connects to a gateway.

reviewEvidence.demoMode: Settings > AirVision M1 > App Preferences > Demo Mode

finalSubmission.notes: Fill these external Play Console artifacts before running scripts/verify-play-submission-package.mjs --final and publish-play-internal.mjs --commit.
